title: Graph window CLI pattern
description: A tiny edge-shaped graph table for demonstrating pi-bio-agent graph-window over an existing DuckDB database.

resolvers.title: SQL materialize
resolvers.description: Materialize a table from read-only SQL.

params.sql: SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('toolcall:readme','executes','run:readme'), ('run:readme','invoked_by','toolcall:readme'), ('run:readme','produced','artifact:readme-result'), ('run:readme','used_manifest','manifest:graph-window')) AS t(from_id, predicate, to_id)
